message:
chore(beads): record 4 closed REVIEW-A9 bead entries

Updates .beads/issues.jsonl with the closed-state records for the four
beads resolved in the most recent commits on this branch:

- flywheel_connectors-3a3r6 — closed by 916475a4 (fcp-sdk: require opt-in
  for ambient FCP_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS override)
- flywheel_connectors-e6sz8 — closed by 49c09845 (fcp-sandbox: SAFETY
  comments on macos.rs production unsafe blocks)
- flywheel_connectors-t6wmw — closed by b8bf6da3 (fcp-conformance/interop/
  session: retire local helpers, exercise production fcp_protocol APIs)
- flywheel_connectors-wyq8x — closed by d2749cfd (fcp-core: refresh
  object_id golden vector after SchemaId::hash separator-collision fix)

Each entry carries the resolution notes and (where applicable) the
verification comment recorded by the agent that closed it. No code
changes — bookkeeping only so the local beads JSONL store matches the
state already pushed via the corresponding fix commits.
